ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* Annual GDP growth rate */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living below the poverty line */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy at birth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "gas_consumption" REAL /* Gas consumption in millions of cubic meters */,
  "income_per_capita" REAL /* Income per capita in USD */,
  "gas_price" REAL /* Gas price in USD per liter */,
  "cars_per_capita" REAL /* Cars per capita (number of cars per 1000 people) */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita in USD */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate */,
  "foreign_direct_investment" REAL /* Foreign direct investment (in millions of USD) */,
  "public_debt" REAL /* Public debt as a percentage of GDP */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "co2_emissions" REAL /* CO2 emissions in millions of metric tons */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index (0-500, where lower is better) */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Water quality index (0-100, where higher is better) */,
  "renewable_energy_share" REAL /* Share of renewable energy in the total energy consumption */,
  "deforestation_rate" REAL /* Annual deforestation rate */,
  "water_usage_per_capita" REAL /* Water usage per capita (in liters per day) */,
  "waste_management_efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of waste management (0-100, where higher is better) */,
  "biodiversity_index" REAL /* Biodiversity index (0-100, where higher is better) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "source_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, private, international organization) */,
  "source_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data entry */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_update_date" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_coverage" TEXT /* Coverage of the data (e.g., national, regional, global) */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., economic, environmental, social) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metadata_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_metadata_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or research team the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
